title: Technical Sales Engineer (Precision Manufacturing/Woodlands)
description:
Job Summary

Manage and grow customer accounts across Singapore and Malaysia by leveraging technical knowledge and cross-functional collaboration to drive business growth and customer satisfaction in a precision manufacturing environment.

Responsibilities

  • Manage and expand existing customer accounts in Singapore and Malaysia to increase revenue and deepen client relationships
  • Analyze mechanical drawings to support accurate communication and coordination with engineering and production teams
  • Identify and pursue new business opportunities within existing accounts to contribute to company growth
  • Collaborate with management to support the development of new customers and market segments
  • Participate in sales visits, presentations, and discussions to effectively represent the company and influence customer decisions
  • Monitor order status and delivery schedules to ensure timely fulfillment of customer requirements
  • Address customer feedback, resolve issues, and provide basic technical clarifications to maintain high service standards
  • Prepare detailed sales reports, forecasts, and account updates to inform management decision-making
  • Perform ad hoc duties as assigned by management to support business operations

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical Engineering or related discipline
  • At least 3 years of experience in sales or engineering within a precision manufacturing environment
  • Basic ability to read and interpret mechanical drawings, with GD&T knowledge considered an advantage
  • Experience engaging with customers in Singapore and/or Malaysia
  • Proficient in MS Office applications
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills to build customer trust and facilitate collaboration
  • Customer-oriented mindset with a focus on service excellence
  • Basic commercial and negotiation skills to support sales activities
  • Willingness to travel within Singapore and Malaysia as required

Other Information

  • Office: Woodlands | Mon – Fri (8:30AM to 6PM)

Candidates available immediately or within short notice preferred

  • We invite interested candidates to send in your updated resume (in MS Word Format) to: theresa@personnellink.com.sg. Please state your reason(s) for leaving each employment and your current/expected salary package. Please indicate the position you are applying for in your email subject. Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality. We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
  • EA License: 90C3627
  • EA Reg No: R1108020

postedCompany.description:
As a leading Recruitment consultancy in Singapore with about two decades of experience, Personnel Link JobHub has created a niche for itself in successfully providing manpower services such as Executives searches, Temporary, Permanent and overseas placements to global companies and SMEs.

Personnel Link JobHub seeks to help organisations yield the maximum benefits on their recruiting investments. This is accomplished with the dedication of a pool of committed recruitment consultants who come from various backgrounds, equipped with their own set of expertise in the respective industries
